why_golfers_like_it: High-quality simulation technology for year-round practice
Versatile venue suitable for both casual play and serious skill development
Accommodates a wide range of clientele from individuals to large groups

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available for food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for highly accurate ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site. However, you are welcome to bring your own set if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the facility has a full kitchen and bar available for your convenience.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round on a simulator generally takes between 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players in your bay and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is your venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf is a family-friendly environment that welcomes golfers of all ages and skill levels, making it a great option for a family outing.
